parameters.subject: Hi {{$json.firstName}}, quick question
parameters.html:
Hi {{$json.firstName}},

I wanted to check in — it's been a while since we last connected. Have you had any changes to your health coverage or insurance needs?

If anything has changed or if you'd like to review your current coverage, I'm here to help.

Reply to this email or book a free call.

To your health,
Larry

parameters.subject: {{$json.firstName}}, are you still there?
parameters.html:
Hi {{$json.firstName}},

I haven't heard from you in a while and just wanted to make sure you have the coverage you need.

Many people don't realize that health and insurance needs change over time. If your situation has changed or if you want to explore your options, I'd love to connect.

Read our Medicare guide or schedule a free consultation.

Warm regards,
Larry Buckalew
Buckalew Financial Services

parameters.subject: {{$json.firstName}}, we miss you + a special offer
parameters.html:
Hi {{$json.firstName}},

It's been a while! I wanted to reach out with something that might interest you.

We've just published new resources comparing 2026 Medicare plans in Florida. If you're approaching Medicare eligibility or want to review your current coverage, this might be helpful.

View Medicare Resources →

If you're not looking for insurance help right now, just reply and I'll make sure not to reach out again. No hard feelings!

To your health,
Larry
